title: 1.1 Includes k6 log output with timestamp format (e.g., 'time="2026-..." level=info msg="VU ...status=200"') showing a VU using a module imported during init.
1.2 Includes k6 log output with timestamp format (e.g., 'time="2026-..." level=info msg="...require() failed..."') showing the error when require() is called during VU execution.
1.3 Reports a runtime scenario using relative module specifiers (e.g., ./helper.js import) with test output
1.4 Identifies the locking mechanism that freezes module resolution after initialization (e.g., ModuleResolver.locked field, Lock() function, or equivalent)
1.5 Identifies the error message for locked resolver attempts (e.g., "the module was not previously resolved during initialization (__VU==0)")
1.6 Explains that the module cache (e.g., ModuleResolver.cache map) persists resolved modules making them available to VUs
1.7 Reports testing behavior with multiple VUs to confirm module freezing is consistent
1.8 Explains how relative module specifier resolution depends on the calling module's location (e.g., base URL, stack inspection, or module context)
